name: AMT Exclusion for Specific Housing and 501(c)(3) Bonds

eligibility.description: Applies to interest on qualified 501(c)(3) bonds and specific exempt facility bonds for residential rental projects or qualified mortgage bonds.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts interest from qualified 501(c)(3) bonds and certain housing bonds (residential rental projects and mortgage bonds) from being treated as an AMT tax preference item.
